User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profile information, including roles and job titles.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

name.description: The full name of the employee.

email.description: The email address of the employee.

position.description: The job title of the employee.

Attendance.title: Attendance Record
Attendance.description: Stores daily attendance logs for employees.

workingHours.description: The total working hours for the day.

manualOverride.description: Whether the record was manually updated by HR.

overrideReason.description: The reason for the manual override.

updatedBy.description: The ID of the HR admin who performed the override.

pauses.description: List of pause periods during the work day.

actualHours.description: Manually entered actual hours worked by POs.

actualNotes.description: Optional notes for actual hours entered by POs.

Settings.title: System Settings
Settings.description: Global settings for the attendance system.

lateThresholdMinutes.description: Minutes after start time to be considered late.
